name: Set up local Kafka broker for integration testing

references.text: Migration path: Package users run tansu:start for local dev. Production Kafka setup deferred. Focus docs on local Tansu usage.
Full round-trip test: Producer → Kafka → Replicating consumer with verification. World extends Identifiable, topic naming: world-${id}
npm scripts: tansu:start (idempotent), tansu:stop, test:integration (calls tansu:start then runs tests). Reserves kafka: prefix for future use.
Documentation: Create doc/tansu.md (dedicated Tansu setup guide) and add reference in README.md. Avoids confusion with kafka1.md.

summary: Evaluate and implement local Kafka setup (Docker Compose/Redpanda/KRaft) with integration tests for event emission patterns
